things.name: Old Medina & Friday Mosque
things.description: Ancient Arab-influenced medina with the 11th-century Friday Mosque and its distinctive minaret

things.name: Karthala Volcano
things.description: One of the world's largest active calderas at 2361m - challenging hike through cloud forest

things.name: Chindini Beach
things.description: Pristine black volcanic sand beach on the west coast with turtle nesting

things.name: Chomoni Beach
things.description: Beautiful cove with crystal-clear water and healthy coral reef - excellent snorkeling

things.name: Itsandra Village & Palace Ruins
things.description: Ancient royal village with the ruins of a Sultan's palace and traditional dhow building

things.name: Anjouan Island
things.description: Fragrant spice island with the old Arab town of Mutsamudu and ylang-ylang plantations

things.name: Ylang-Ylang Distillery Tour
things.description: Comoros produces most of the world's ylang-ylang essence for Chanel No.5

things.name: National Museum of Comoros
things.description: Traditional island artefacts, historical photographs and sultan memorabilia

things.name: Coelacanth Dive Sites
things.description: Dive to find the living fossil coelacanth fish in the Comoros Marine Park

things.name: Moroni Market (Volovolo)
things.description: Morning market where traders sell spices, vanilla, coconuts and crafts
